reasoning: Multiple authoritative sources confirm that Starlink was licensed in Somalia in April 2025, but officially launched and went live on August 5, 2025. Articles from August repeatedly emphasize this as the official launch, detailing pricing and explicitly mentioning Elon Musk sharing the Starlink availability map marked as 'Available' across the country in August. Although a single Reuters headline from April 13 broadly claimed 'Musk says Starlink now available in Somalia', other contemporaneous sources clarify he had actually announced the granting of the license, not commercial availability. As the actual launch and mapping update to 'Available' occurred in August 2025, the website would not have shown Somalia as 'Available' before the July 1, 2025 deadline.
